violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and other debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The floors in the boiler room have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024
